title: Totem of Undying Inosuke
description: This Totem Factory DBX pack replaces the Totem of Undying with Inosuke Hashibira, capturing his wild boar mask and aggressive fighting spirit in bold pixel art
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffbfbe84e0fcd468baf72d6b1405e0fb5bd0e2b1.png)

# ✨ Demon Slayer Totem – Inosuke Hashibira

Unleash raw strength and fearless energy in your survival world.
This Totem Factory DBX pack replaces the Totem of Undying with **Inosuke Hashibira**, capturing his wild boar mask and aggressive fighting spirit in bold pixel art. Perfect for players who love chaotic, high-energy characters.

## ⭐ Features

- 🎨 Custom Totem of Undying retextured as **Inosuke Hashibira**

- ✨ Pixel-art style inspired by Demon Slayer’s action-heavy designs

- 🐗 Reflects Inosuke’s Beast Breathing and untamed personality

- ⚡ Fully compatible with other Totem Factory DBX packs

- 📦 Lightweight .zip resource pack, no OptiFine required

## 🔧 Installation

1. Download the .zip file
2. Place it inside your **resourcepacks** folder
3. Activate in Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs
4. Charge into danger with Inosuke’s fearless spirit.

## 🖌️ Credits

Inspiration: **Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba** (Koyoharu Gotouge)
